scope.purpose: deployment-action sensitivity at fixed predeclared thresholds gamma={0.3,0.5,0.7} on the same frozen probability maps
scope.scientific_headline: the ten target-adapted conditions; six general/external conditions remain fixed stress controls
scope.status: descriptive deployment-action sensitivity; this is neither test-set threshold tuning nor a robustness guarantee

specification.accepted_set_agreement: tie-aware fractional Jaccard at coverage 0.25, 0.50, and 0.75

contrasts.difference: AURC(left) - AURC(right); lower AURC is better
contrasts.name: dice_vs_nhd_under_dice

contrasts.difference: AURC(left) - AURC(right); lower AURC is better
contrasts.name: dice_vs_nhd_under_nhd

contrasts.difference: AURC(left) - AURC(right); lower AURC is better
contrasts.name: nhd_vs_nhd95_under_nhd

contrasts.difference: AURC(left) - AURC(right); lower AURC is better
contrasts.name: nhd_vs_nhd95_under_nhd95

specification.direction_rule: negative favors left, positive favors right, and exactly zero is a tie; no data-dependent tolerance is used
specification.tie_policy: analytic expectation over random within-score-tie order
